description: Letter by the two guardians appointed by Shemuel b. Avraham, called Yosef b. Binyamin and Yefet b. Ṭoviyya and their supervisor named Mevorakh b. Yosef. The writers inform the addressees and former partners of Shemuel, about his death and ask them to transport the merchandise held by them for the partnership to them or bring its price in cash. Related to T-S 10J30.7. (Information from Bareket)
